opportunity.title: Schedule tasks on the web
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The challenge with web-scheduled tasks often isn't the scheduling itself, but ensuring idempotency across providers—a failed task retried on a different system can cause unexpected side effects. Consider a "mutation ID" pattern alongside your scheduling to track and prevent duplicate actions, especially when dealing with eventual consistency. It's a surprisingly common gotcha.
actions.reasoning: My experience building AI agents with task scheduling and routing directly aligns with the core concepts discussed in the post.
